positive: A complex, neo-geometric mandala illustration featuring swirling cosmic dust, stylized mythical flora, and constellations. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum visual impact on an apparel print. Use deep sapphire blues, iridescent golds, and glowing teal accents, creating a high-contrast, ethereal glow effect. The style should blend intricate Art Nouveau detailing with modern psychedelic pop art, utilizing sharp silhouettes and clean linework against a subtly textured black void background. High resolution, maximalist design, symmetrical radial pattern, print-ready vector quality.
